# NetMirror (net27.cc)
> Movie discovery platform for trending movies, TV shows, anime, Hindi dubbed titles

## About
NetMirror is a movie and show discovery platform. We help users find where to watch content across Netflix, Prime Video, JioHotstar, SonyLIV, Crunchyroll, and other streaming services.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://net27.cc/
- Movies: https://net27.cc/movies/
- TV Shows: https://net27.cc/shows/
- Anime: https://net27.cc/anime/
- Trending: https://net27.cc/trending/
- Blog: https://net27.cc/blog/
- App Download: https://net27.cc/app/download/
- Contact: https://net27.cc/contact/

## Contact
Email: net27.cc@gmail.com
